expandedPrompt: A whimsical alien tennis player with an oversized head and a compact body, sporting a vibrant green skin tone. The character has large expressive eyes, a cheerful smile, and wears a sporty headband. The silhouette features elongated limbs and a distinctive star-shaped antenna on top of its head. The alien is holding a tennis racket with a glowing tennis ball, and its feet are adorned with colorful tennis shoes. The background includes sparkles to emphasize the playful atmosphere.

expandedContent:
{
  "title": "Alien Tennis Player",
  "expandedPrompt": "A whimsical alien tennis player with an oversized head and a compact body, sporting a vibrant green skin tone. The character has large expressive eyes, a cheerful smile, and wears a sporty headband. The silhouette features elongated limbs and a distinctive star-shaped antenna on top of its head. The alien is holding a tennis racket with a glowing tennis ball, and its feet are adorned with colorful tennis shoes. The background includes sparkles to emphasize the playful atmosphere.",
  "subject": "an alien character who plays tennis",
  "mood": "playful",
  "palettePlan": { "primary": "vibrant green", "secondary": "bright yellow", "accent": "glowing white" },
  "styleTags": ["cute mascot", "glossy SVG", "blue-avatar quality"],
  "visualChecklist": [
    "oversized head with large expressive eyes",
    "cheerful smile",
    "star-shaped antenna",
    "sporty headband",
    "elongated limbs",
    "glowing tennis ball",
    "colorful tennis shoes",
    "tennis racket",
    "sparkles in the background",
    "compact body",
    "playful posture",
    "visible tennis court markings"
  ],
  "requiredDetails": [
    "vibrant green skin tone",
    "star-shaped antenna on head",
    "sporty headband",
    "glowing tennis ball"
  ],
  "requiredRenderableDetails": [
    { "id": "head", "label": "oversized head", "acceptableShapes": ["headShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["headSocket"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "eyes", "label": "large expressive eyes", "acceptableShapes": ["eyeShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["eyeSocket"], "minimumCount": 2 },
    { "id": "racket", "label": "tennis racket", "acceptableShapes": ["racketShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["handSocket"], "minimumCount": 1 },
    { "id": "shoes", "label": "colorful tennis shoes", "acceptableShapes": ["shoeShape"], "acceptableSockets": ["footSocket"], "minimumCount": 2 }
  ],
  "forbiddenDetails": ["raw SVG", "HTML", "unvalidated custom shapes", "external images"],
  "qualityConstraints": ["oversized expressive head", "compact connected body", "readable silhouette", "valid renderer sockets only"]
}

rawReactCssCharacterContent:
{
  "componentName": "AlienTennisPlayer",
  "styleSystem": "my-dude-react-css-scaffold",
  "title": "Whimsical Alien Tennis Player",
  "summary": "A playful alien character with vibrant green skin, oversized head, and sporty attire, ready to play tennis.",
  "cssVariables": {
    "--dude-primary": "#00ff00",
    "--dude-secondary": "#ffff00",
    "--dude-accent": "#ffffff",
    "--dude-eye": "#000000",
    "--dude-panel": "rgba(255,255,255,.18)",
    "--dude-mouth": "#ffcc00",
    "--dude-body": "#00ff00",
    "--dude-arm": "#00ff00",
    "--dude-hand": "#ffff00",
    "--dude-leg": "#00ff00",
    "--dude-foot": "#ffcc00"
  },
  "headShape": "rounded",
  "bodyShape": "compact",
  "expression": "excited",
  "parts": [
    { "type": "antenna", "side": "top", "label": "star-shaped antenna", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "headband", "label": "sporty headband", "tone": "secondary" },
    { "type": "eye", "side": "left", "label": "large expressive eye", "tone": "eye" },
    { "type": "eye", "side": "right", "label": "large expressive eye", "tone": "eye" },
    { "type": "mouth", "label": "cheerful smile", "tone": "mouth" },
    { "type": "hand", "side": "right", "label": "tennis racket", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "hand", "side": "left", "label": "glowing tennis ball", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "shoe", "side": "left", "label": "colorful tennis shoe", "tone": "foot" },
    { "type": "shoe", "side": "right", "label": "colorful tennis shoe", "tone": "foot" }
  ],
  "notes": [
    "The character features a vibrant green skin tone, oversized head with large expressive eyes, and a cheerful smile.",
    "Includes a star-shaped antenna and a sporty headband.",
    "Holds a glowing tennis ball and a tennis racket, with colorful tennis shoes."
  ]
}
